titleStmt.title: SII 26.752: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 752. (A.R. No. 701 of 1909.) TUṞAIYŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājarājadēva III: Year 3, Mīṉa (Paṅguṉi) ba. 11, Saturday, Sadaiyam = 1218 A.D., March 24, f.d.n. ·07.

summary.p: This inscription states that the ūrār of Tuṟaiyūr (on the bank of the river) Kīḻ-Palāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, set up an image of the goddess of the Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam named Nallanāyaki and an image of Subrahmaṇyappiḷḷaiyār in the temple of the god Tiruvālīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at the village, and that they made a gift of land 7-3/8 mā in extent in the place in favour of these images. It is stated that they had undertaken to pay the taxes due on the gift-land themselves. A number of men representing the ūr figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatu miṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ
rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup pāccil kūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟut tuṟaiyūr Ūrom nammūr Uṭaiyār tiruvāliśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tirukkāmakko
ṭṭanācciyār nallanāyakiyāṟkum subrahmaṇyappiḷḷaiyāṟkum nāṅkaḷ tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka cipātattu nirvārttuk kuṭutta vilai nilattukkicainta kiḻpāṟkellai [ kaṉ
ṉaṭi] ppaṭṭakkiṟāy Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa karainilattukkum ceṅkaḻuniroṭaikkum meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ūrmatiḷukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Ūrmatiḷukkum ko
llar taccar taṭṭār Uḷḷiṭṭār puḻaikkaṭai matuḷukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paṭṭakkiṟāy Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa Iraṇṭāṅkaraik karai nilattukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa mikutik
kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka nilam khasam mūn_ṛumā Iṉṉilam Eḻu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Innācciyār nallanāyakiyāṟkum subrahmaṇyappiḷḷaiyāṟkum candrādityavarai cellak kaṭavatākavum
Innilattukku nāṅkaḷe kaṭamai Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Iṟukkum Iṭattu karaiyile viḻukkāṭu viṭṭu Āyam Uṭpaṭa Iṟuttuk kuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭik ku
ṭuttom tuṟaiyūr Ūrom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl tirunāmattukkāṇippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutinen Ivvūr maddhyasthan tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān kariyamāṇitevan tiruvāliśvaramuṭaiyāṉāṉa maḻa
ṉāṭṭu veḷāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūr veḷāṉ poṉṉampalakkūttaṉāṉa vaṭakarai nāṭṭu veḷāneṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān nitta kalliyā
ṇan tillainaṭampurintāṉāṉa maḻavataraiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān tavapperumāḷ centapirāṉāṉa vaḷavataraiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān
(n) civapātacekaran cempiyataraiyan sayicñātanamaikku I� yūruṭaiyān veḷān poṉṉampalakkūttaṉāṉa vaṭakaraināṭṭu veḷān Eḻuttu Itu vilaiveli Uṭaiyān
Uyyavantāṉāna tirukkatavuṭaiyān maḻanāṭṭaraiyan sayicñāta m Ippaṭikkum Eyitalūruṭaiyān tevan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉāṉa pāmpā nāṭṭuk kon Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai ṉaḷuruṭaiyān Uyyavantān periyanāyaṉāṉa ḻalai nāṭṭu muventaveḷān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān Āḷavantāṉ caṅkaratevaṉāna cem
piyan va nāṭṭu muventaveḷān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eṇṇaikkuṭaiyān nampi Uyyakkoṇṭanāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyān kūttā
ṭuvān Irārā vaṭakaraināṭṭu veḷān Eḻuttu Itu veḷḷūruṭaiyān A rāḻvān periyanāyan sayicñātaṉayaikku Ivai Oru nemam maṉam vaittār Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 26.752 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
